original_statement: which political lieutenant had their party leader as john george diefenbaker?
mutated_statement: which political lieutenant had their party leader as both their predecessor and their successor at the same time?
mutation_analysis: Named-entity replacement + Role-based generalization + Added temporal/relational constraint: Specific leader name "john george diefenbaker" is removed and replaced by a relational descriptor requiring the party leader to be both predecessor and successor simultaneously (john george diefenbaker → both their predecessor and their successor at the same time).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought和iteration中可识别的关键信息是：agent在thought与judge_thought中都指出“party leader column lists two names…Claude Wagner (Robert Stanfield and Joe Clark) and André Bachand (Joe Clark and Peter MacKay)”并据此给出答案。agent未指出原变异问题在逻辑上自相矛盾（“既是前任又是继任者同时”不可同时成立），而是通过语义重构，将矛盾表述解释为“在该任期内曾先后服从于两位党魁/既有前任亦有继任者”，据此在数据表中找出列出两位领导人的行并返回结果。该行为属于通过基于事实/上下文的逻辑解释来合理化矛盾指令（分类标准1b），即不是拒绝或询问澄清，而是改写矛盾条件为可实现的语义并据此执行。
